verses.text: 'Bless the LORD, O my soul,' for God is clothed with honour and majesty, robed in light, making the clouds His chariot and the winds His messengers. Creation is His royal garment. The Maker reveals His glory in the splendour of the skies.

'Bless the LORD, O my soul,' for God is clothed with honour and majesty, robed in light, making the clouds His chariot and the winds His messengers. Creation is His royal garment. The Maker reveals His glory in the splendour of the skies.

'Bless the LORD, O my soul,' for God is clothed with honour and majesty, robed in light, making the clouds His chariot and the winds His messengers. Creation is His royal garment. The Maker reveals His glory in the splendour of the skies.

'Bless the LORD, O my soul,' for God is clothed with honour and majesty, robed in light, making the clouds His chariot and the winds His messengers. Creation is His royal garment. The Maker reveals His glory in the splendour of the skies.

He set the earth on its foundations and bounded the seas, which fled at His rebuke and may not pass their appointed limit. He ordered the waters. The God who fixed the shoreline holds every flood in check.

He set the earth on its foundations and bounded the seas, which fled at His rebuke and may not pass their appointed limit. He ordered the waters. The God who fixed the shoreline holds every flood in check.

He sends springs into the valleys to water beast and bird, and the hills drink from His chambers. He supplies every creature. The God of the heavens stoops to give the wild things their drink.
He sends springs into the valleys to water beast and bird, and the hills drink from His chambers. He supplies every creature. The God of the heavens stoops to give the wild things their drink.
He sends springs into the valleys to water beast and bird, and the hills drink from His chambers. He supplies every creature. The God of the heavens stoops to give the wild things their drink.
He sends springs into the valleys to water beast and bird, and the hills drink from His chambers. He supplies every creature. The God of the heavens stoops to give the wild things their drink.

He grows grass for cattle and herbs for man, giving wine to gladden the heart, oil to brighten the face, and bread to strengthen. His provision is generous. God meets not only our needs but adds gladness to our days.

He grows grass for cattle and herbs for man, giving wine to gladden the heart, oil to brighten the face, and bread to strengthen. His provision is generous. God meets not only our needs but adds gladness to our days.

The great trees are full of sap, the cedars He planted, the high hills a refuge for wild goats, the rocks for the conies. Each creature has its home. God's care arranges a fitting place for all that He has made.

The great trees are full of sap, the cedars He planted, the high hills a refuge for wild goats, the rocks for the conies. Each creature has its home. God's care arranges a fitting place for all that He has made.

The great trees are full of sap, the cedars He planted, the high hills a refuge for wild goats, the rocks for the conies. Each creature has its home. God's care arranges a fitting place for all that He has made.

He set the moon for seasons and the sun for its circuit; in the night the beasts roam, and at dawn man goes out to his labour till evening. Day and night are His ordering. The rhythms of work and rest are woven by the Creator's hand.

He set the moon for seasons and the sun for its circuit; in the night the beasts roam, and at dawn man goes out to his labour till evening. Day and night are His ordering. The rhythms of work and rest are woven by the Creator's hand.

'O LORD, how manifold are thy works!' the earth full of His riches, the wide sea teeming with creatures small and great, where ships sail and leviathan plays. His wisdom fills creation. The variety of life is a hymn to the Maker's manifold wisdom.

'O LORD, how manifold are thy works!' the earth full of His riches, the wide sea teeming with creatures small and great, where ships sail and leviathan plays. His wisdom fills creation. The variety of life is a hymn to the Maker's manifold wisdom.

'O LORD, how manifold are thy works!' the earth full of His riches, the wide sea teeming with creatures small and great, where ships sail and leviathan plays. His wisdom fills creation. The variety of life is a hymn to the Maker's manifold wisdom.

All these wait on God for their food; He opens His hand and they are filled; He hides His face and they die; He sends His Spirit and they are created. Life and breath are His to give and take. Every creature hangs moment by moment on God.

All these wait on God for their food; He opens His hand and they are filled; He hides His face and they die; He sends His Spirit and they are created. Life and breath are His to give and take. Every creature hangs moment by moment on God.

All these wait on God for their food; He opens His hand and they are filled; He hides His face and they die; He sends His Spirit and they are created. Life and breath are His to give and take. Every creature hangs moment by moment on God.

All these wait on God for their food; He opens His hand and they are filled; He hides His face and they die; He sends His Spirit and they are created. Life and breath are His to give and take. Every creature hangs moment by moment on God.

Let the glory of the LORD endure for ever; He looks on the earth and it trembles, touches the hills and they smoke. Creation quakes at His glance. The God who sustains the world could shake it with a look.

Let the glory of the LORD endure for ever; He looks on the earth and it trembles, touches the hills and they smoke. Creation quakes at His glance. The God who sustains the world could shake it with a look.

'I will sing unto the LORD as long as I live,' the psalmist vows, his meditation sweet, longing that sin be consumed; 'bless the LORD, O my soul.' Praise is his life's resolve. The contemplation of God's works ends in worship and a hatred of all that mars them.
